message: chore(ci): pin actions and add dependabot

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,39 @@
+version: 2
+updates:
+  - package-ecosystem: github-actions
+    directory: /
+    schedule:
+      interval: weekly
+    groups:
+      github-actions:
+        patterns:
+          - "*"
+
+  - package-ecosystem: npm
+    directory: /
+    schedule:
+      interval: weekly
+    groups:
+      npm:
+        patterns:
+          - "*"
+
+  - package-ecosystem: docker
+    directory: /scripts/docker/install-sh-smoke
+    schedule:
+      interval: weekly
+
+  - package-ecosystem: docker
+    directory: /scripts/docker/install-sh-nonroot
+    schedule:
+      interval: weekly
+
+  - package-ecosystem: docker
+    directory: /scripts/docker/install-sh-git-smoke
+    schedule:
+      interval: weekly
+
+  - package-ecosystem: docker
+    directory: /scripts/e2e
+    schedule:
+      interval: weekly

@@ -17,10 +17,10 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
 
       - name: Setup Bun
-        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@v2
+        uses: oven-sh/setup-bun@b7a1c7ccf290d58743029c4f6903da283811b979 # v2
         with:
           bun-version: latest
 
@@ -31,7 +31,7 @@ jobs:
         run: bun run build
 
       - name: Upload artifact
-        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
+        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@56afc609e74202658d3ffba0e8f6dda462b719fa # v3
         with:
           path: ./dist
 
@@ -44,4 +44,4 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
         id: deployment
-        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
+        uses: actions/deploy-pages@d6db90164ac5ed86f2b6aed7e0febac5b3c0c03e # v4

@@ -10,7 +10,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout installer
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
 
       - name: Build git smoke image
         run: docker build -t clawdbot-install-git-smoke:ci -f scripts/docker/install-sh-git-smoke/Dockerfile .
@@ -20,4 +20,3 @@ jobs:
           CLAWDBOT_NO_ONBOARD: "1"
           CLAWDBOT_NO_PROMPT: "1"
         run: docker run --rm -t -e CLAWDBOT_NO_ONBOARD -e CLAWDBOT_NO_PROMPT clawdbot-install-git-smoke:ci
-

@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
 
       - name: Install ShellCheck
         run: sudo apt-get update -y && sudo apt-get install -y shellcheck
@@ -23,7 +23,7 @@ jobs:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
       - name: Checkout installer
-        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        uses: actions/checkout@34e114876b0b11c390a56381ad16ebd13914f8d5 # v4
 
       - name: Build smoke image (root)
         run: docker build -t clawdbot-install-smoke:ci -f scripts/docker/install-sh-smoke/Dockerfile .
